extracted.aact_title: A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Pegozafermin in Participants With Compensated Cirrhosis Due to MASH
aact_conditions: metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (mash) / nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (nash) with compensated cirrhosis
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Proportion of Participants Achieving Fibrosis Regression

extracted.aact_title: A Study Evaluating the Efficacy and Safety of Pegozafermin in Participants With MASH and Fibrosis (ENLIGHTEN-Fibrosis)
aact_conditions: metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (mash) / nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (nash) with fibrosis
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Number of Participants With at Least an Improvement of Fibrosis ≥1 Stage Without Worsening of Steatohepatitis at Week 52
